release_boundary.ordinary_agent_verification: focused application or module checks owned by the consuming application
escalate_only_for: release-facing or public Dataphyre framework claims
security, identity/access, session, credential, governance, tenant isolation, billing, privacy, compliance, data residency, retention, legal-hold, or access-policy work
Dataphyre framework internals or reusable framework contributions
not_ordinary_app_ceremony: Dataphyre runtime-internal edits to make one application work

modules.name: access
modules.purpose: Authentication, authorization, guards, user providers, and OAuth/JWT helpers.

modules.name: panel
modules.purpose: Resource definitions for generated internal control surfaces built on SQL, Access, and Templating.

modules.name: aceit_engine
modules.purpose: Legacy experimentation module. It does not use the current `kernel/<module>.main.php` or `Framework/` discovery shape.

modules.name: api
modules.purpose: API route definitions, security schemes, OpenAPI generation, and Swagger UI support.

modules.name: async
modules.purpose: Coroutines, promises, process dispatch, queues, and async task orchestration.

modules.name: caspow
modules.purpose: Proof-of-work anti-spam and abuse-control challenge system.

modules.name: core
modules.purpose: Runtime bootstrap, module discovery, config, helpers, app location, autoloading, and framework loading.

modules.name: currency
modules.purpose: Money values, exchange rates, conversion, and formatting helpers.

modules.name: datadoc
modules.purpose: Runtime and source documentation surface.

modules.name: date_translation
modules.purpose: Localized date strings and language resources.

modules.name: dpanel
modules.purpose: Diagnostics, dependency checks, and dynamic unit-test tooling.

modules.name: firewall
modules.purpose: Request filtering, abuse controls, rate limits, and security routing support.

modules.name: flightdeck
modules.purpose: Developer control surface for diagnostics and runtime tools.

modules.name: fulltext_engine
modules.purpose: Search indexing, tokenization, stemming, scoring, and external search adapters.

modules.name: geoposition
modules.purpose: Geographic lookup and location utilities.

modules.name: http
modules.purpose: Framework HTTP request/response primitives.

modules.name: issue
modules.purpose: Issue/report helpers.

modules.name: localization
modules.purpose: Locale lookup, generated locale files, and database-backed translation maintenance.

modules.name: mailer
modules.purpose: Native email delivery, provider failover, templates, queues, scheduling, webhooks, suppressions, and delivery health snapshots.

modules.name: mcp
modules.purpose: Local Model Context Protocol server for Dataphyre-aware AI tooling, docs, diagnostics, and route-free verification.

modules.name: mvc
modules.purpose: Native MVC application layer that composes HTTP, Routing, Templating, and SQL into controllers, route groups, view results, middleware, and lightweight models.

modules.name: permission
modules.purpose: Semantic authorization rules, roles, audits, permission catalogs, Panel authorization, policy gate integration, and optional Laravel adapter support.

modules.name: reactor
modules.purpose: Server-driven component lifecycle, signed snapshots, actions, effects, model binding, nested components, and route-agnostic UI islands.

modules.name: routing
modules.purpose: Dynamic and compiled routing support.

modules.name: sanitation
modules.purpose: Input bags, sanitizer presets, validation, and sanitization results.

modules.name: scheduling
modules.purpose: Framework task definitions, period helpers, scheduler routes, task runner, and scheduled job orchestration.

modules.name: sql
modules.purpose: Database access, query helpers, records, repositories, transactions, and table scaffolding.

modules.name: storage
modules.purpose: Secure file storage abstraction for local disks, S3-compatible object storage, and thin Vestra reference aliases.

modules.name: stripe
modules.purpose: Stripe integration wrapper around the bundled Stripe PHP client.

modules.name: supercookie
modules.purpose: JSON cookie-backed session/state helper.

modules.name: templating
modules.purpose: Templates, manifests, rendering, bindings, layouts, and asset policy support.

modules.name: time_machine
modules.purpose: Time-aware diagnostics and runtime time helpers.

modules.name: tracelog
modules.purpose: Execution tracing, handoff traces, and trace viewer support.

modules.name: vestra
modules.purpose: Vestra Fabric client for object references, tenant-aware asset URLs, HTML ingestion, and application usage accounting.
